name: Kinetik Holdings Inc.
business: Kinetik Holdings Inc. is an integrated midstream energy company in the Permian Basin providing comprehensive gathering, transportation, compression, processing and treating services. The company's core capabilities include natural gas gathering, transportation, compression, treating and processing; NGLs stabilization and transportation; produced water gathering and disposal; and crude oil gathering, stabilization, storage and transportation.
sellsTo: Exploration and production companies in the Permian Basin
Local distribution companies and interstate pipelines

exposures.sentence: We are an integrated midstream energy company in the Permian Basin providing comprehensive gathering, transportation, compression, processing and treating services.

catalysts.event: Kings Landing processing complex achieves full commercial in-service
catalysts.sentence: The Company achieved full commercial in-service at Kings Landing in late September 2025.

catalysts.event: ECCC Pipeline estimated to be in-service
catalysts.sentence: The ECCC Pipeline is estimated to be in-service during the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Acid Gas Injection project at Kings Landing expected in-service
catalysts.sentence: The project is expected to be in-service by year end 2026.

On January 14, 2025, the Company completed the previously announced bolt-on acquisition with Permian Resources Corporation... to acquire all issued and outstanding membership interests of Permian Gathering and Barilla Draw for $175.5 million of cash consideration.

On October 31, 2025, the Company consummated the previously announced Purchase and Sale Agreement... and received $504.2 million of upfront cash consideration in exchange for its entire 27.5% interest in EPIC.
